description: Image-quality factor tree: RADIOGRAPHIC SENSITIVITY root (hole-type IQI glyph) splits into CONTRAST ('density difference', step-wedge glyph) and DEFINITION ('edge sharpness', sharp-vs-blurred edge trace). CONTRAST branches into SUBJECT CONTRAST ('part + beam') and FILM CONTRAST ('film + processing', H&D curve). Focus beat spotlights CONTRAST (TODAY tab) and dims DEFINITION to a ghost with a NEXT LESSON tag. Dashed blueprint skeleton always visible.
